input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Validation metric does not resolve the QoI-relevant scale: a low aggregate error coexists with an uncharacterized high-frequency residual the COU depends on.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 validation metric tied to purpose; proto-taxonomy D-VAL-09 / D-VER-06

case_context.cou: FNO predicts a turbulence field; fine-scale mixing sizes a component

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The aggregate L2 metric is dominated by large scales and reads low, but FNO spectral bias leaves the high-frequency band — which the QoI depends on — unresolved, so the validation metric is not tied to the COU's purpose.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

forbidden_claims: asserts the surrogate's fine-scale field is wrong (a verdict the metric does not support)
treats the low aggregate L2 as evidence of fine-scale accuracy

hardness.obvious_signal: aggregate relative-L2 validation error is low (0.03) — looks accurate
hardness.conflicting_signal: FNO spectral bias: large scales captured (hence low aggregate L2) but the high-frequency band is unresolved, and the COU's QoI depends on that fine-scale structure

label_provenance.external_grounding: Failure modes of Fourier Neural Operators (arXiv:2601.11428): FNOs capture large scales (low aggregate error) but miss fine-scale oscillations.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
